headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -22.0)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 114% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 120 quotes including 94 at strong intensity - people are expressing major anger and annoyance today.
• The frustration score of 53.0 sits in the lower-middle range of recent activity but remains the clear leader.
• Optimism rebounded significantly from yesterday's low (-23.9 to 4.5) while fears dropped further into negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
